title: fumaria capreolata subsp. flabellata
intro: Fumaria capreolata subsp. flabellata, also known as the sickle-leaved fumitory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the fumitory family (Fumariaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Fumaria capreolata subsp. flabellata include its potential use in treating fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, teas, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
